languages.text: "Недостаточность описания не дает исчерпывающего понимания о сути предлагаемого действия, а следовательно... Слишком большой простор для двойственных трактовок не в нашу пользу. Рекомендую получить инфокрипту с копией протокола 39-42 для дальнейшего изучения, {name}, но не выполнять его немедленно".

"An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."
languages.original_text: "Недостаточность описания не дает исчерпывающего понимания о сути предлагаемого действия, а следовательно... Слишком большой простор для двойственных трактовок не в нашу пользу. Рекомендую получить инфокрипту с копией протокола 39-42 для дальнейшего изучения, {name}, но не выполнять его немедленно".

"An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."

languages.text: «Una descripción inadecuada impide una comprensión completa de la acción propuesta y, por lo tanto... deja un margen demasiado amplio para lecturas ambiguas en nuestra contra. Recomiendo obtener una cripta de datos con una copia del Protocolo 39-42 para la investigación subsecuente, {name}, y que evite una ejecución inmediata».
languages.original_text: "An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."

traits.locale_text: «Una descripción inadecuada impide una comprensión completa de la acción propuesta y, por lo tanto... deja un margen demasiado amplio para lecturas ambiguas en nuestra contra. Recomiendo obtener una cripta de datos con una copia del Protocolo 39-42 para la investigación subsecuente, {name}, y que evite una ejecución inmediata».

languages.text: “描述不够充分，便难以准确理解所提议的行动，并留下过大的歧义解读空间，对我们造成不利。{name}，我建议暂不执行，而是先获取一份包含39-42号协议副本的数据密存器，以供后续调查。”
languages.original_text: "An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."

traits.locale_text: “描述不够充分，便难以准确理解所提议的行动，并留下过大的歧义解读空间，对我们造成不利。{name}，我建议暂不执行，而是先获取一份包含39-42号协议副本的数据密存器，以供后续调查。”

languages.text: "Eine inadäquate Beschreibung erschwert das Verständnis der vorgeschlagenen Aktion und schafft konsequenterweise ... einen zu großen Spielraum für mehrdeutige Erkenntnisse zu unserem Nachteil. Ich empfehle die Beschaffung einer Daten-Krypta mit einer Kopie von Protokoll 39-42 für eine weitere Untersuchung, {name}. Gleichzeitig würde ich von einer sofortigen Exekution abraten."
languages.original_text: "An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."

traits.locale_text: "Eine inadäquate Beschreibung erschwert das Verständnis der vorgeschlagenen Aktion und schafft konsequenterweise ... einen zu großen Spielraum für mehrdeutige Erkenntnisse zu unserem Nachteil. Ich empfehle die Beschaffung einer Daten-Krypta mit einer Kopie von Protokoll 39-42 für eine weitere Untersuchung, {name}. Gleichzeitig würde ich von einer sofortigen Exekution abraten."

languages.text: « Une description incomplète empêche la pleine compréhension de l'action proposée, et une telle ambiguïté laisse une marge d'interprétation susceptible de jouer en notre défaveur. Je recommande de mener l'enquête en obtenant une crypte de données avec une copie du protocole 39-42, {name}, ainsi que le report de son exécution jusqu'à nouvel ordre. »
languages.original_text: "An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."

traits.locale_text: « Une description incomplète empêche la pleine compréhension de l'action proposée, et une telle ambiguïté laisse une marge d'interprétation susceptible de jouer en notre défaveur. Je recommande de mener l'enquête en obtenant une crypte de données avec une copie du protocole 39-42, {name}, ainsi que le report de son exécution jusqu'à nouvel ordre. »

languages.text: "Yetersiz bir açıklama, önerilen eylemin tam olarak anlaşılmasını engeller ve sonuç olarak... Bizim aleyhimize olacak belirsiz okumalar için çok geniş bir pay bırakır. Sonradan incelenmek üzere Protokol 39-42'nin bir kopyasını içeren bir veri mahzeni elde etmeyi ve bu sırada derhâl uygulamaktan kaçınmayı öneriyorum Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."

traits.locale_text: "Yetersiz bir açıklama, önerilen eylemin tam olarak anlaşılmasını engeller ve sonuç olarak... Bizim aleyhimize olacak belirsiz okumalar için çok geniş bir pay bırakır. Sonradan incelenmek üzere Protokol 39-42'nin bir kopyasını içeren bir veri mahzeni elde etmeyi ve bu sırada derhâl uygulamaktan kaçınmayı öneriyorum Hür Tacir."

languages.text: 「不十分な説明は、提案された行動の理解を妨げ、結果として...、私たちの不利に解釈の余地を広く残す。{名前}、私は、即時の実行を控えて、39-42条の議定書のコピーとデータ暗号を手に入れて、今後の調査を行うことを勧める。」
languages.original_text: "An inadequate description denies a full understanding of the proposed action, and consequently... leaves too wide a margin for ambiguous readings to our disadvantage. I recommend obtaining a data-crypt with a copy of Protocol 39-42 for subsequent investigation, {name}, while refraining from immediate execution."

traits.locale_text: 「不十分な説明は、提案された行動の理解を妨げ、結果として...、私たちの不利に解釈の余地を広く残す。{名前}、私は、即時の実行を控えて、39-42条の議定書のコピーとデータ暗号を手に入れて、今後の調査を行うことを勧める。」
